summary: Theron-Medical structured clinical chart review and coding assistance
description: Performs structured clinical documentation review using Theron-Medical, the 100B+ medical specialist. Analyzes clinical notes, lab values, imaging reports, and medication lists to produce ICD-10/CPT coding suggestions, missing documentation flags, and care gap alerts. PHI is processed in HIPAA-compliant US-only infrastructure. Output is advisory; final coding and clinical decisions remain with licensed providers. Requires BAA with Vext Labs.
